caption: A man with a tall, silver, sculpted hairstyle and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders. He wears black headphones over his hair while positioned in front of a black microphone. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a yellow shirt with the word "LEE" visible. The "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" logo appears on the screen in two different styles. Across the sequence, the man remains seated and facing slightly to the right, with his mouth moving as if he is speaking. His posture and expression shift slightly as he talks, and he appears to be gesturing with his hands below the frame's edge, though the overall scene and background remain static.
